title: Cryo Archive Goes Live Friday, March 20
author: Chandler Bellgrave
excerpt: Cryo Archive, Marathon's first end-game zone aboard the UESC Marathon, opens Friday March 20. Here's everything you need to know — requirements, Vaults, contracts, Security Clearance, and more.

title: Marathon Update 1.0.5 Patch Notes
author: Chandler Bellgrave
excerpt: Full patch notes for Marathon Update 1.0.5 — Cryo Archive zone added, 3 new implant perks, 3 new weapon mods, WSTR Combat Shotgun nerfs, Rook unlocked at Level 0, exfil while downed, and more.

title: Marathon Duos Mode Is Coming — Limited-Time Test Starts March 18 on Perimeter
author: Chandler Bellgrave
excerpt: Game Director Joe Ziegler confirms a limited-time duos queue is coming to Perimeter on March 18 at 10AM PT. Premade groups only, matched against other duos, lasting roughly two weeks.

title: Marathon Update 1.0.0.4 Patch Notes
author: Chandler Bellgrave
excerpt: Full patch notes for Marathon Update 1.0.0.4 — UESC health reductions, Rook backpack fix, thermal scope nerfs, new NuCaloric and Traxus contracts, Outpost Broken Wing disabled, and more.

title: Marathon Rewards Pass Gets Major S1 Update — New Skins, Arachne Earnable Styles & More
author: Chandler Bellgrave
excerpt: Bungie is adding three new Runner Shell Styles to the Season 1 Rewards Pass, making Arachne Shell Styles earnable via the Codex, and retroactively crediting LUX bundle buyers — all targeting mid-April.

title: Marathon Quickly Pushes Past 100,000 Users on Steam
author: Chandler Bellgrave
excerpt: Despite months of internet skepticism and more than a few Concord comparisons circulating online, Marathon has already pushed past 100,000 concurrent users on Steam.

title: Marathon Launch Times — When Does Marathon Go Live?
author: Chandler Bellgrave
excerpt: Marathon launches worldwide on March 5 at 10AM PT on Steam, PS5, and Xbox Series X|S. Here are the regional launch times plus a live countdown and the full launch day FAQ.

title: Marathon Server Slam Is Live — How to Download
author: Chandler Bellgrave
excerpt: The Marathon Server Slam is now live. Here's how to download on Steam, PS5, and Xbox, plus the full Server Slam FAQ.

title: Marathon's Shadow Index Runner Skin Collection Revealed
author: Chandler Bellgrave
excerpt: Bungie's cryptic Tau Ceti IV teaser site has revealed the Shadow Index runner skin collection for six of Marathon's seven runners — here's every skin catalogued.

title: Here Is When Marathon's Server Slam Goes Live
author: Chandler Bellgrave
excerpt: Straight to the point — here is every regional start time for Marathon's Server Slam open preview weekend, running February 26 to March 2, 2026. No preloading confirmed.

title: Steam Exclusive Crowbar Weapon Charm Revealed for Marathon
author: Chandler Bellgrave
excerpt: Marathon's first Steam exclusive cosmetic is a Crowbar weapon charm — a clear nod to Valve's Half-Life series. Every platform now has its own exclusive charm.

title: Marathon Receives Xbox Exclusive Minecraft-Inspired Cosmetics
author: Chandler Bellgrave
excerpt: Bungie confirms two new Minecraft-inspired weapon charms exclusive to Xbox Series X|S players at Marathon's launch — the Emerald Catch and Emerald Clutch.

title: Marathon Anti-Cheat & Networking Explained — Dedicated Servers, Fog of War & More
author: Chandler Bellgrave
excerpt: Bungie details Marathon's anti-cheat systems, dedicated server networking, Fog of War, BattlEye integration, connection recovery, and permaban policy for cheaters.

title: PlayStation Plus Exclusive Marathon Weapon Charms Revealed
author: Chandler Bellgrave
excerpt: Sony's State of Play revealed three exclusive PlayStation Plus weapon charms coming to Marathon at launch — paying homage to Helldivers 2, Death Stranding 2, and Ghost of Yōtei.
